key.name: refresh-interval
key.description: How often to refresh system metrics, in seconds (1–30).

key.name: show-cpu
key.description: Whether to show CPU usage percentage in the panel.

key.name: show-memory
key.description: Whether to show memory usage percentage in the panel.

key.name: show-temperature
key.description: Whether to show device temperature in the panel.

key.name: show-icons
key.description: Whether to show icons next to metric values in the panel.

key.name: show-labels
key.description: Whether to show text values next to icons in the panel.
